history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A black and white, high-contrast, dynamic action shot of Cristiano Ronaldo in his Real Madrid uniform, mid-run on a football pitch. He is wearing a white jersey with "bwin" prominently displayed across the chest, and white shorts with the number "7" visible on the left leg. His left arm is extended outwards, and his right arm is bent at the elbow, as if in pursuit of the ball or celebrating a goal. The stadium crowd is blurred in the background, creating a sense of depth and focus on the player. The lighting is dramatic, casting strong shadows and highlighting the textures of the uniform and the player's determined expression. The overall mood is energetic, intense, and iconic.
